creator: olgeni@uli.it
text:
This is version 0.8.13 of UAE, the Un*x Amiga Emulator. UAE allows you to
run most of the available Amiga software. It is a software emulation,
meaning that no extra or special hardware is needed to do this.

More about UAE at http://www.freiburg.linux.de/~uae/

Fix: =20
How-To-Repeat: =20
